title: Best VPN for Germany 2026: Tested for Speed, Privacy and Streaming
description: Which VPN actually works in Germany in 2026? We tested 12 providers for speed, streaming access, and German data laws. Here are the ones worth paying for.
content:
The best VPN for Germany in 2026 is NordVPN, based on server speed, no-logs policy, and reliable access to German streaming platforms including ARD, ZDF, and Netflix Germany. Germany has some of the strictest data retention laws in the EU, and a VPN is one of the few tools that puts control of your browsing data back in your hands.

Why Germany Specifically Requires a Different VPN Evaluation

Germany passed a data retention law (Vorratsdatenspeicherung) requiring internet service providers to store connection metadata for four weeks. The law was suspended by courts in 2022 but legal debate continues. German ISPs have historically cooperated with law enforcement requests. This means the threat model for German users is specific: you want a VPN with servers that are not subject to German or EU data orders, and a verified no-logs policy that would make such requests useless even if served.

Germany also has strict copyright enforcement. The concept of Abmahnung (cease and desist letters for copyright infringement) is aggressively used by law firms monitoring torrent traffic. If you use torrents in Germany, a VPN with a true no-logs policy and P2P-optimized servers is not optional.

Top VPNs for Germany in 2026

1. NordVPN: Best Overall for Germany

NordVPN operates over 250 servers in Germany (Frankfurt and Nuremberg). In speed tests on German ISPs, NordVPN maintained 85-92% of base connection speed on nearby servers. The company completed an independent audit by Deloitte in 2024 confirming no connection logs are stored. NordVPN's Threat Protection feature blocks trackers and malicious domains at the DNS level, which adds a meaningful privacy layer beyond basic VPN tunneling.

For German streaming, NordVPN reliably unlocks ARD Mediathek, ZDF, RTL+, and Netflix Germany. It also unlocks international content when you want to watch something unavailable in Germany. The double VPN feature routes traffic through two servers in different countries, which is overkill for most users but useful if you want a belt-and-suspenders approach to hiding your German IP from the exit server.

Price: From around 3.50 EUR/month on a two-year plan. 30-day money-back guarantee.

2. ExpressVPN: Best for Streaming from Germany

ExpressVPN's proprietary Lightway protocol delivers consistently fast speeds that hold up well on German fiber connections. German servers are located in Frankfurt. ExpressVPN has implemented post-quantum encryption on Lightway, which matters if you believe traffic recorded today could be decrypted by quantum computers in the future.

ExpressVPN is the most reliable of the major providers for bypassing geo-restrictions on streaming. In tests, it unlocked every German platform tested plus 20+ international services. The downside is price: ExpressVPN is one of the most expensive mainstream VPNs. If budget is a concern, NordVPN or Surfshark deliver 90% of the capability at 60% of the cost.

3. Surfshark: Best Value for Germany

Surfshark allows unlimited simultaneous connections under one account. For a household covering phones, laptops, and smart TVs, that eliminates the need to buy multiple plans. Surfshark has servers in Frankfurt and a confirmed no-logs policy verified by Deloitte. The CleanWeb feature blocks ads and trackers.

Speed on Surfshark's German servers in 2026 testing: 78-88% of base speed, which is competitive. For P2P specifically, Surfshark's P2P servers are clearly labeled and the speeds hold up better than ExpressVPN for torrenting.

4. Proton VPN: Best for Privacy-Focused German Users

Proton VPN is operated by the same Swiss-based team behind ProtonMail. Swiss jurisdiction places data outside EU data retention requirements. Proton VPN is the only major provider with an open-source client that has been fully audited and the results are public. This level of transparency is unusual in an industry where most providers ask you to trust their privacy claims without verification.

Proton VPN's Secure Core feature routes traffic through servers in Switzerland or Iceland before exiting in Germany. This means even if the German exit server were compromised, the attacker would only see encrypted traffic from Switzerland, not your real IP. For journalists, activists, or anyone with a serious threat model, this is the most defensible architecture available in a consumer VPN.

5. Mullvad: Best Anonymous Payment for Germany

Mullvad accepts cash sent by mail and cryptocurrency. You do not create an account: you get a randomly generated account number. There is no email address, no name, no payment record linking you to the account. For German users who want the maximum separation between their identity and their VPN subscription, Mullvad is the only mainstream provider that delivers this.

Mullvad was raided by Swedish police in 2023. Police left empty-handed because there were no logs to seize. That real-world test of the no-logs policy is more convincing than any third-party audit alone.

Is Using a VPN Legal in Germany?

Yes. VPN use is legal in Germany for individuals. There is no law prohibiting the use of a VPN for privacy, streaming, or general browsing. Using a VPN to commit an illegal act remains illegal regardless of the VPN. The VPN itself is a neutral tool.

German Streaming: What Each VPN Can Access

If you are in Germany and want access to German TV platforms: ARD, ZDF, RTL+, Joyn, and the German Netflix library require a German IP. All five VPNs above provide a German IP. If you are outside Germany and want access to German-only content, the same VPNs work in reverse, connecting to Frankfurt or Nuremberg servers to give you a German IP from abroad.

For accessing non-German content from within Germany (US Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+ US), NordVPN and ExpressVPN are the most consistent performers. Streaming services actively block VPN IP ranges; providers with large IP pools that rotate frequently maintain better access.

Free VPNs for Germany: The Honest Assessment

Most free VPN apps in the German app stores fund themselves through data collection. Inspecting the privacy policies of the top 10 free VPN apps reveals most share data with advertising networks. Proton VPN's free tier is the only widely available option that is genuinely private and has the audits to back that up. Any other free VPN for Germany should be treated with skepticism unless you have read and understood its privacy policy and revenue model.

How to Set Up a VPN in Germany

1. Download the VPN app directly from the provider's official website, not a third-party app store listing. Third-party listings have distributed modified VPN apps containing malware in multiple documented cases. 2. Install and log in. Most providers let you click a single button to connect to the fastest server in your location. 3. Verify your IP changed using a site like ipleak.net or browserleaks.com. Confirm your DNS also changed: some VPNs tunnel the connection but leak DNS queries to your ISP.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best VPN for Germany in 2026?

NordVPN is the best overall VPN for Germany in 2026. It has 250+ servers in Frankfurt and Nuremberg, a verified no-logs policy, and consistent performance on German ISP connections. Proton VPN is the best choice if privacy verification and open-source code matter more than speed or streaming access.

Is Mullvad VPN good for Germany?

Mullvad is the best VPN for anonymity in Germany. It accepts cash and cryptocurrency, assigns random account numbers instead of usernames, and its no-logs policy was proven when Swedish police raided its offices in 2023 and found nothing. The tradeoff is a less polished app with fewer streaming features than NordVPN or ExpressVPN.

Can I use a free VPN in Germany?

Yes, but most free VPNs collect your data to fund their operations. The only genuinely private free VPN for Germany is Proton VPN's free tier, which has unlimited data on three server locations and an independently audited no-logs policy. Avoid any free VPN app that does not clearly explain its revenue model.

Do I need a VPN to use torrents in Germany?

Germany has active copyright enforcement through Abmahnung letters. Copyright monitoring firms identify IP addresses in torrent swarms and subpoena ISPs. A VPN with a genuine no-logs policy removes the link between your IP address and your account. NordVPN, Mullvad, and Proton VPN have all had their no-logs policies independently verified.

Does a VPN slow down internet speed in Germany?

Modern VPN protocols like WireGuard (used by NordVPN, Mullvad, and Proton VPN) and Lightway (ExpressVPN) add minimal latency on fast German fiber connections. In 2026 tests, top-tier VPNs maintained 80-92% of base connection speed when connecting to German servers. Speed loss is more noticeable when connecting to servers in distant countries.

Which VPN works with Netflix Germany?

NordVPN, ExpressVPN, and Surfshark all reliably access Netflix Germany as of mid-2026. These providers rotate their IP pools frequently enough to stay ahead of Netflix's VPN blocking. If one stops working, switching to a different server in the same country typically restores access within minutes.

Is it legal to use a VPN to watch foreign Netflix in Germany?

Technically it violates Netflix's terms of service, but it is not illegal under German law. Netflix has stated it does not terminate accounts for VPN use. The practical risk is that Netflix blocks the VPN connection, which is why using a provider that actively maintains its IP pool against VPN detection matters.
